evidence_sentence: High levels of OCT4 enable self-renewal in the absence of BMP4 but specify mesendoderm in the presence of BMP4.
cell_type_sentences: Distinct lineage specification roles for NANOG, OCT4, and SOX2 in human embryonic stem cells.
Nanog, Oct4, and Sox2 are the core regulators of mouse (m)ESC pluripotency.
Although their basic importance in human (h)ESCs has been demonstrated, the mechanistic functions are not well defined.
Here, we identify general and cell-line-specific requirements for NANOG, OCT4, and SOX2 in hESCs.
Our study revises the view of how self-renewal is orchestrated in hESCs.
